description: Composition Red crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, fabric tape lining on the inside of the neck, and print on the chest with a brand tab above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Unleash your wild side with this funky lee t-shirt. The combination of multi-coloured newspaper print on red adds a stylish twist to this t-shirt, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable through all seasons. Pair it with jeans or chinos and stylish footwear from the wide international collection available at myntra for that extra zing to your life. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
